gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/306)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/306)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ لَا يُجَامِعُ الْمُخْتَضِبُ قُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ لِمَ لَا يُجَامِعُ الْمُخْتَضِبُ قَالَ لِأَنَّهُ مُحْتَصَرٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Muhsayn Bin Ahmad, from Aban, from Misma’a Bin Abdul Malik who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The dyed one should not copulate’. I said, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! Why shouldn’t the dyed one copulate?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Because he is restricted (by the application of the dye)’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Bandar has narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from his father from ‘Abd Allah ibn al-Qasim from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Beware of speaking when two sexual organs meet; it may cause dumbness and muteness.’”
